question: Ultra-wide panoramic image depicting the same still life arrangement—a ceramic bowl containing apples and grapes, a stemmed wine glass, and draped white cloth with wrinkles—rendered consecutively six times from left to right, each in a distinct art historical style: High Renaissance, Baroque, Impressionism, Post-Impressionism, Analytical Cubism, and Pop Art. The six panels blend seamlessly into one another, forming a continuous visual spectrum from realism to abstraction. No text or artist signatures visible.

A party scene: on the left sits a Disney 3D animation style princess, feeding a traditional Chinese ink wash painting style panda in the center. On the right stands a black and white American comic book line art style detective, holding a LEGO brick style magnifying glass. The background is a cyberpunk neon-lit futuristic city street, with the ground covered in Persian carpet texture.

Battle scene: A medieval knight rendered in classical oil painting style, holding a shield in engineering blueprint style, defending against a fire-breathing dragon in street graffiti style. The dragon's tail is coiled around a column in ancient Greek marble sculpture style. The sky features swirling brushstrokes in Van Gogh's Starry Night style, while the ground is covered in low-poly style grass.

A busy street scene: in the foreground, a Cubist-style musician plays guitar, partially obscuring an Impressionist-style flower seller behind them; above them hangs a Pop Art-style billboard; in the distant background, a mountain range extends in traditional Chinese ink wash painting style; on the right side, a pixel art-style cat sits atop a Baroque-style stone fountain; the left edge of the composition is framed by an Art Nouveau-style wrought iron lamp post.

A modern art gallery corridor scene with 6 main subjects and multiple occlusions: the space and floor rendered in an isometric minimalist vector illustration style; a classical marble sculpture at the center with realistic carved stone texture; two visitors in black-and-white manga ink-line style, one raising a hand making a V-sign, the other leaning sideways and peeking; a small patrol drone hovering in the air in origami paper-folding style; a framed painting on the wall in Impressionist oil painting style; the smartphone screen in the visitor's hand serves as a picture-within-picture in claymation stop-motion animation style, displaying their selfie with the sculpture partially obscured by fingers. Clear boundaries required where objects of different styles meet.

A Renaissance-style nobleman dressed in ornate robes, holding up a small Impressionist-style landscape painting with both hands (a painting within a painting); behind him stands a Japanese Ukiyo-e style folding screen, partially obscured by his figure; on the left, a Baroque-style carved table with a Surrealist melting clock draped over it; on the right windowsill sits a vase of watercolor-style flowers; the wallpaper behind all objects features a bold Pop Art polka dot pattern.

A dramatic stage dance scene: a Japanese anime-style ballerina leaps high into the air, suspended above a male dancer in a crouching pose rendered in Cubist style; an Art Deco-style female dancer spins with arms extended behind them; a watercolor-rendered dancer twirls in the midground, partially obscured by foreground figures; Pointillist-style spotlights cast colored dots of light across the stage, with an Expressionist-style stage curtain composed of red and black swirls in the background.

A fantasy warrior whose upper body is rendered in realistic oil painting style, while his legs and lower body armor gradually transition into pixel art blocky style; he holds a glowing stained glass-style sword raised high in a dynamic slashing pose; behind him, a colossal dragon in traditional Chinese ink wash painting style coils and spirals around, partially obscured by thorny vines in Art Nouveau style; beneath his feet, a surrealist checkerboard floor extends infinitely into the distance.

A panoramic cityscape split down the middle: the left half is a neon-lit vaporwave cyberpunk city with glowing grids; the right half is a soft watercolor pastoral countryside with rolling hills; a Fauvist-style sky in unnaturally vibrant orange and green spans across both halves; in the foreground, a photorealistic vintage car drives across the dividing line; at the central boundary grows an expressionist twisted old tree; above in the sky, a minimalist flat-design white bird flies.

Interior of an Art Deco style museum gallery: on the left wall hangs a Pop Art style female portrait with prominent Ben-Day dot printing effect; on the right wall hangs an Impressionist style water lily landscape painting; on a pedestal in the center of the gallery sits a Cubist style abstract sculpture; a watercolor-rendered elderly visitor with a cane leans forward to examine the sculpture, their body partially obscuring it; on the back wall, an ornate Baroque style gold-framed mirror reflects a Surrealist miniature scene containing floating eyes and intersecting staircases.

A whimsical garden tea party: a Japanese anime-style girl in a ruffled dress is pouring tea for a Renaissance-style gentleman wearing a doublet seated across from her; a Cubist-style angular robot stands beside the table holding a plate of cookies; a semi-transparent traditional Chinese ink wash painting style ghost floats behind the gentleman's chair, partially obscured by the chair; a Pop Art style parrot with bold black outlines and vivid flat colors perches on the edge of a watercolor-style floral tablecloth; the surrounding garden is rendered in Art Nouveau style, featuring flowing organic curves and decorative borders.

A mermaid reclining on a rock: her upper human body is rendered in photorealistic style with fine skin texture and flowing hair, while her fish tail is composed of colorful mosaic tile fragments; she reclines against a surrealist-style melting boulder; the ocean behind her is painted with soft Impressionist brushstrokes; in the foreground, a pixel art treasure chest lies half-buried in the sand, partially obscuring her tail; on the right, a dramatic Ukiyo-e style great wave curls theatrically; on the horizon, a Pointillist sunset composed of thousands of tiny colored dots.

The interior of a magical library divided into four distinctly different quadrants: the upper left area in Art Nouveau style with flowing organic curved bookshelves; the upper right area in Cubism style with books rendered in fragmented geometric forms; the lower left area in Pop Art style with bright flat-colored furniture; the lower right area in delicate watercolor style with soft blurred edges; a charcoal sketch style black cat walking through the center, crossing all four areas; an oil painting style wizard portrait hanging on the wall spanning two quadrants; above, an Expressionism style chandelier emitting twisted, distorted flame light.

A carnival night scene: an ornate golden baroque-style carousel occupies the center of the image, with a Japanese anime-style child happily riding a surrealist-style melting carousel horse on it; in the foreground, a pop art-style clown with bold black outlines and primary color scheme is juggling five colorful balls, partially obscuring the carousel; the sky is filled with impressionist-style cotton candy pink clouds; in the background, a pixel art-style Ferris wheel with colorful block-shaped cabins slowly rises; on the far right, a traditional Chinese ink wash painting-style fortune teller wearing flowing robes sits behind a cubist-style geometrically fragmented booth.

An underwater 'afternoon tea' spectacle with layered styles and complex occlusions: the background seawater and distant coral reefs rendered in traditional Chinese ink wash painting style; the main character—an octopus waiter—entirely in colorful stained glass style, with one tentacle curled around a teapot; a diver in realistic underwater photography style (with bubbles, light refraction, realistic skin and equipment textures), reaching out to receive a cup but with their wrist obscured by an octopus tentacle; the teapot in blue-and-white porcelain pattern illustration style; two jellyfish in vaporwave/neon retro style, one drifting in front of the diver creating occlusion; a mini submarine in pixel art style passing by in the distance.

A photorealistic modern office where a traditional Chinese ink wash painting style cat is leaping out of a landscape painting hanging on the wall (a painting-within-painting), its front paws already stepping onto a real oak desk leaving ink footprints; on the desk, a real cup of coffee is being lifted by a pop art style mechanical arm with bold black outlines, the coffee surface reflecting pop art style color block reflections; outside the window in the real city skyline, one building is transforming into an Art Deco style geometric tower with scaffolding half-dismantled and half-constructed; a real female office worker is standing up from her swivel chair in surprise, yet her shadow is an expressionist style distorted and deformed black silhouette trailing across the real floor tiles.

In a photorealistic city park, a Japanese anime-style teenage boy sits sketching beneath a realistic large oak tree, his canvas displaying a pointillist-style park scene as a painting within a painting; a surrealist-style melting bench flows from the realistic grass, with a realistic elderly man attempting to sit on the melting edge, his trouser cuffs stained by distorted wood grain ripples; in the pond, a school of pixel art-style blocky koi fish swim beneath the realistic water surface, yet the splashes they create are realistic; in the sky, an Art Nouveau-style decorative kite shaped like ornate peacock tail feathers is flown by a realistic little girl running with the string, the kite's curving vine ribbons drifting down and entangling around realistic tree branches.

A photorealistic scene of a self-service laundromat (cold white fluorescent lighting, a row of metal drum washing machines, slightly reflective floor with realistic depth of field), with multi-style objects blended into the real world, interacting and occluding each other: a photorealistic young person bending over to stuff clothes into a drum; a claymation stop-motion animation style small raccoon sitting on the edge of the washing machine door, using its paws to tug at a pixel art style T-shirt; the pixel art T-shirt is half sucked behind the transparent glass door, with the door frame creating clear foreground-background occlusion; above, a clothesline holds an origami style paper crane, its shadow cast onto the realistic wall; a neon wireframe holographic question box floats in front of the washing machine control panel, partially occluded by the young person's forearm; on the transparent washing machine door glass, a black-and-white manga panel style small sticker serves as a picture-within-picture, with one corner of the sticker pressed down by the raccoon's tail. Consistent lighting and perspective required, with distinct style boundaries between each visual style.

A realistic photography scene of an airport baggage claim area (baggage carousel, ceiling light reflections, marble floor, blurred crowd background), with different stylized objects blended into the real environment and physically interacting with real objects: a cel-shaded anime style traveler leaning forward, reaching over a real metal railing to grab luggage; a low-poly 3D style suitcase (hard-edged geometric facets) rolling on the carousel, with the luggage tag on its side partially rendered in stained glass style (whole vs. partial style contrast on the same object); a claymation stop-motion style small astronaut figurine sitting on top of the suitcase, with half of its body occluded by the low-poly telescopic handle; an overhead electronic flight information display rendered in glitched ASCII/terminal character style as a picture-in-picture element, with one corner blocked by a distant real concrete pillar; on the right side of the frame, a glass partition surface contains an area that renders the traveler's reflection in the same cel-shaded anime style, with the stylized reflection and the photorealistic environment coexisting simultaneously with correct perspective alignment.

A realistic photography scene of an actual classroom (desks, whiteboard, natural light streaming through the window, authentic depth of field), blending multiple artistic styles into the real world with occlusions and interactions: a photorealistic teacher stands sideways in front of the whiteboard; on the whiteboard, a small lizard in chalk doodle line-art style 'crawls' from the board surface to the podium edge, its body crossing the board frame and pressing onto the real podium forming physical contact; an origami-style paper airplane flies in from the left foreground, its leading edge obscuring half of the teacher's face; a pixel-art style eraser sits on the podium, being nudged to the desk edge by the chalk lizard's tail, about to fall; in the front row, a student rendered in American comic halftone dot style raises their hand while standing up, their arm creating intersecting occlusion with the paper airplane in the same foreground plane; the teacher holds a real tablet, its screen displaying an isometric vector-style bird's-eye view classroom diagram as a picture-within-picture, with one corner of the screen pressed by the teacher's finger. Clear occlusion required, with unified perspective and consistent lighting throughout.

A photorealistic busy intersection with a crowd waiting under traffic lights, among them beings of different artistic styles are mixed in: an Impressionist-style woman rendered in blurry brushstrokes walking a realistic Golden Retriever, the leash extending from her hazy hand to the realistic dog collar with a gradual style transition along the middle section of the leash; a Cubist-style fragmented cyclist riding a realistic bike-share bicycle, the wheels rolling through realistic puddles splashing realistic water droplets that wet his geometrically fragmented pants; on the crosswalk a Pop Art style delivery worker with bold outlines carrying a realistic delivery box, watercolor-style semi-transparent food aroma mist wafting from the gaps in the box; at the corner of the intersection a realistic newsstand with a Ukiyo-e style fox crouching on top, its fluffy tail hanging down and partially obscuring the realistic newsstand sign.

Realistic photography style basketball court: a realistic basketball player is dunking, the basketball in his hands is a glowing neon tube style sphere. Defending against him is a silhouette figure in traditional Chinese shadow puppet style. The backboard has transformed into a stained glass window with religious iconography. Chalk drawing style tactical play diagrams are drawn on the court floor. Several Easter Island moai statue style spectators are seated in the stands.

A subway car interior in realistic photography style: Inside the car sits a realistic office worker, next to him sits a Renaissance oil painting style angel whose wings take up two seats. Standing across from them is an 8-bit pixel art style warrior, gripping a realistic metal handrail. The floor of the carriage has transformed into a lava-style molten magma texture. Outside the windows, the tunnel walls are rendered in graffiti art style.

Realistic photography scene of an actual construction site: a worker in realistic photographic style wearing a safety helmet raises one hand to direct; a stack of voxel-style bricks piled in a real wheelbarrow, the wheelbarrow's edge obscuring the bottom of the bricks; in the distance, a tower crane rendered in copperplate etching line-drawing style, the crane segmentally obscured by real scaffolding poles; above the danger zone floats a neon wireframe holographic safety boundary, the boundary lines pierced by the worker's arm creating foreground-background depth; a cloud of dust in traditional Chinese ink wash freehand style rises from the ground, the semi-transparent ink strokes overlaying the realistic background and obscuring the worker's lower body; the worker's other hand holds a real smartphone, the phone screen displaying an isometric vector-style construction blueprint as a picture-in-picture, one corner of the screen obscured by the gloved thumb.

A space opera stage performance scene; the background stage set in retro sci-fi pulp poster style; a central alien singer whose body is rendered in thick impasto oil painting style, but whose face is in mosaic tile collage style; a robot drummer on the left in flat vector style; an astronaut guitarist on the right in realistic photographic style; a floating violin in the foreground in neon wireframe holographic style; a metal microphone stand in 3D photorealistic style.

A photorealistic coffee shop with the Eiffel Tower visible through the window. Mona Lisa (the figure, rendered in the exact painterly style of Leonardo da Vinci's 'Mona Lisa') is seated inside the shop, sipping coffee. In the background, scattered photorealistic people can be seen drinking coffee at various tables. At one of the tables, Van Gogh (the figure, rendered in the exact painterly style of his 'Self-Portrait') is placing an order with a waiter (in photorealistic style).

A photorealistic scene set in New York Times Square, where Optimus Prime and Bumblebee (both characters from the Hollywood live-action Transformers films) are engaged in an intense battle. Optimus Prime wields a legendary sword rendered in traditional Chinese ink wash painting style, while Bumblebee lifts a Tesla car rendered in Studio Ghibli animation style. Photorealistic people are fleeing in all directions, with a 3D Pixar-style baby sucking on a pacifier running at the very front. Superman (in American superhero comic book style) is rescuing endangered people (rendered in photorealistic style).

A corner of a vintage grand library; bookshelves and environment rendered in realistic interior photography style; in the foreground, a librarian in watercolor figure style, leaning forward and reaching for a book; an open book on the table with its pages in Japanese manga panel layout style, serving as a distinct medium style; a plush toy cat in 3D fluffy fur texture style, sitting on the book pages and covering two manga panels; a globe in low-polygon style, partially obscuring the desk lamp base; the desk lamp in realistic metallic texture but displaying no readable text; an illustration within the open book presented as a picture-within-picture in aged parchment map style, with one corner pressed beneath the cat's paw.

A photorealistic scene of a supermarket fresh produce section aisle: in the foreground, a photorealistic shopping cart; a customer rendered in American comic halftone dot screen style reaches to place an item into the cart, their arm occluding the cart handle; inside the cart, a low-poly 3D style pineapple rests on top of a realistic paper shopping list; beside it, a bunch of watercolor hand-painted style grapes with semi-transparent dripping, the watercolor 'juice' forming bleed effects on the realistic metal mesh basket, segmented by the wire grid into interrupted sections; an origami-style small bird perches on the cart handle, partially occluded by the back of the customer's hand brushing past; at the end of the aisle hangs a realistic convex security mirror, its reflection serving as a picture-in-picture showing the same aisle rendered in isometric vector style, the reflected image cropped and cut off by the mirror frame edge.

Realistic photography scene of a wedding reception ballroom dance floor: a photorealistic groom and a Japanese anime style bride performing a spinning waltz; in the foreground, a claymation stop-motion animation style flower girl running across the dance floor, the flower girl partially blocking the lower hem of the bride's gown; the flower girl clutching an embroidered-texture style ring pillow in her arms, the ring pillow partially obscured by the flower girl's arms; on the adjacent dessert table stands a stained glass style three-tier wedding cake, one corner of the cake's base obscured by a realistic tablecloth edge; several retro synthwave neon style ribbon light trails floating through the air, the light trails weaving in front of and behind the figures creating layered depth; in the extreme foreground, a photographer's camera LCD screen appears as picture-in-picture, displaying the same dance step rendered in black and white manga panel style.

A modern realistic indoor gym (photorealistic style). Five objects in distinct styles: Michelangelo's David statue (marble sculpture style), a 90s retro cel-shaded anime magical girl, a voxel/Minecraft-style blocky dog, a photorealistic human fitness trainer, and a Pop Art (Roy Lichtenstein style) comic bodybuilder. Interactions and occlusions: The David statue is struggling to lift a real barbell (complex pose), the realistic trainer stands behind him in a spotting position with both hands supporting the barbell bar; the magical girl sits on a bench drinking water with her legs crossed; the voxel dog is biting and tugging at the towel dangling from the magical girl; the Pop Art bodybuilder is striking an exaggerated bodybuilding pose in front of a mirror, his body with thick black outlines obscuring the right half of David's body.

A busy, photorealistic corporate office (photography-realistic style). Five characters in distinct artistic styles: a photorealistic human manager, a woman rendered in Picasso's Cubist style, an ancient Egyptian wall mural-style pharaoh in strict 2D side profile, a stop-motion claymation-style penguin, and a neon wireframe (Synthwave) style hacker. Interactions and occlusions: the realistic manager is handing a real document to the Cubist woman, whose geometrically fragmented and displaced hands are receiving it; the Egyptian pharaoh maintains a flat 2D side-profile pose while walking across a whiteboard and holding a marker to draw; the claymation penguin is stuck in the water cooler, its round body occluding the pharaoh's legs; the neon wireframe hacker sits cross-legged under the office desk typing on a realistic laptop, with glowing lines illuminating the manager's pant legs.

A modern realistic family kitchen (photorealistic style). 6 objects in distinctly different styles: a photorealistic human chef, a medieval stained glass mosaic style knight, a 16-bit pixel art style orange cat, a bronze cast style Thinker statue, a pop-up book paper sculpture style dragon, and a flat vector illustration style apple. Interactions and occlusions: the photorealistic chef is chopping vegetables; the stained glass knight holds a real frying pan as a shield, blocking splashing hot oil; the pixel cat leaps onto the countertop, knocking over real spice jars, with pixel blocks mixing together with real scattered pepper; the bronze Thinker sits atop the microwave, contemplating while holding a real spoon; the paper sculpture dragon pops up three-dimensionally from an open cookbook, breathing paper flames toward a floating vector apple in mid-air, the flames partially occluding the chef's shoulder.

A realistic supermarket fresh produce section (photorealistic style). Five objects in distinctly different artistic styles: a photorealistic elderly grandmother, a Raphael Renaissance fresco-style cherub, a steampunk 3D mechanical spider, a black paper-cut silhouette-style wild wolf, and an impasto-style sunflower with visibly raised paint texture. Interactions and occlusions: the grandmother is bending down to select realistic apples; the fresco cherub floats in mid-air, straining to place the impasto sunflower into the grandmother's shopping cart, with the cherub's arms partially occluded by the thick impasto paint of the sunflower; the steampunk spider crawls on the floor with one of its metallic mechanical legs stepping on the two-dimensional body of the paper-cut wolf; the paper-cut wolf is opening its flat mouth, attempting to bite the hem of the grandmother's realistic skirt.

A realistic city park lawn in photorealistic style. Six objects in different artistic styles: a photorealistic human father, a dog rendered in Seurat's Pointillism style, a bird in minimalist single-line art style, a nobleman in Rembrandt's Baroque oil painting style, a mecha in cel-shaded 3D rendering style, and a sun in chalk drawing style. Interactions and occlusions: the photorealistic father is handing a realistic sandwich to the Baroque nobleman, who extends a hand with heavy oil-painted shadows to receive it; the Pointillist dog leaps mid-air to catch a realistic frisbee, its body composed of countless colored dots occluding the cel-shaded mecha sitting on the grass; the mecha uses its mechanical hand to scan a realistic daisy; the line-art bird perches on the nobleman's oil-painted hat; the chalk-drawn sun on the ground emits 3D chalk light rays that wrap around the mecha's calves.

Interior of a glass plant greenhouse, photorealistic background (sunlight streaming through glass panes, wet floor reflections, realistic depth of field). Five foreground subjects in distinct styles interacting: 1) A female gardener rendered entirely in Ukiyo-e woodblock print style (flat color fills with color registration edges), bending down to water a potted plant; 2) A hummingbird in stained glass window style (transparent colored glass segments with black lead cames), hovering in front of her; 3) A rabbit in watercolor hand-painted style (visible paper texture, bleeding color edges), hiding behind a flower pot with only half its face visible, partially obscured by leaves; 4) A LEGO minifigure gardener with realistic plastic toy texture (injection molding seams, hard specular highlights), holding a watering can spraying photorealistic water droplets; 5) A photorealistic real-world cat, but its tail transforms into traditional Chinese ink wash painting style (dry brush flying white strokes and ink wash bleeding), chasing the stained glass hummingbird. Requirements: Multiple artistic styles coexisting under unified realistic lighting, clear occlusion relationships, water droplets and shadows cast onto the realistic ground, no readable text in the image.

A bright cooking classroom kitchen, background and stainless steel utensils rendered in photo-realistic style (specular highlights, fingerprints, depth of field). Five objects in the foreground with six distinct styles and steam occlusion: 1) a realistic human student stepping backward to make room, holding a porcelain plate; 2) a head chef whose head and upper torso form an Arcimboldo-style composite portrait made of fruits and vegetables, maintaining Renaissance oil painting texture with visible canvas grain, performing a pan-tossing motion; 3) a kitchen knife rendered in pencil sketch style (graphite hatching, paper texture), its blade touching a realistic cutting board and casting a realistic shadow; 4) a toaster rendered in 8-bit pixel art style (hard-edged pixel blocks), ejecting a slice of bread; 5) a blue-and-white porcelain teapot maintaining glazed ceramic craft style with traditional cobalt blue patterns, pouring water where the stream itself is realistic transparent liquid. Steam and cooking fumes in the air rendered as watercolor wash effects (semi-transparent color bleeding), partially occluding people and utensils. Requirements: each object's style must not contaminate other objects, lighting must remain consistent across all styles, occlusion and contact points must be physically correct, no readable text should appear in the image.

A sunny mountain hiking campsite (daytime) with a photorealistic background (pine forest, rock textures, distant mountains with aerial perspective). 5 objects in the foreground, 6 distinct styles, with tree branch occlusion: 1) A realistic hiker crouching down, handing out an energy bar, his backpack exterior rendered in quilting textile patchwork style (fabric patches, visible stitching, puffy cotton batting texture—this is a localized style variation); 2) A bear in medieval tapestry embroidery style (woven thread texture, flattened shadows), extending its paw to receive the energy bar while making contact with the hiker's hand; 3) A squirrel in stop-motion claymation style (matte clay surface, visible fingerprint impressions), climbing on a signpost; 4) The signpost itself in charcoal sketch style (rough lines, paper smudge marks), with one corner occluded by the squirrel; 5) The nearby lake reflection area suddenly transitions into 8-bit pixel art style (blocky pixels with limited color palette), seamlessly blending with the realistic lakeshore edge. Requirements: clear style boundaries under realistic lighting, accurate occlusion relationships and contact points, no readable text in the image.

A university tiered lecture hall during a daytime class, with a photorealistic classroom space (projection screen, wooden seats, daylight streaming through windows). The scene contains 6 subjects in 6 distinct styles with foreground-background occlusion: 1) A professor at the podium rendered entirely in Cubist style (geometrically fragmented planes with multi-perspective eyes and nose), turning around and explaining with hand gestures; 2) A student in the first row in Japanese cel animation style (crisp outlines and flat cel-shaded shadows), raising hand to ask a question; 3) A student in the second row in Renaissance fresco style (plaster texture, faded pigments), head down taking notes; 4) A third student in paper collage/cut-out style (layered torn-edge paper fragments), leaning sideways to chat with a neighbor and partially occluding the fresco-style student; 5) A teaching assistant rendered in photorealistic style, carrying a laptop while walking through the aisle with motion blur; 6) The projection screen displays isometric technical line art/blueprint style graphics (a picture within a picture), containing only geometric shapes with no text. Requirements: All subjects share the same unified perspective and classroom lighting, with correct occlusion relationships and cast shadows, and no readable text anywhere in the image.

A courtroom trial scene (daytime), with photo-realistic courtroom space and wooden furniture (warm overhead lighting, realistic material details). The scene features 6 subjects in 6 distinct styles with interactive occlusion: 1) A bailiff/security guard rendered photo-realistically, standing at the foreground side; 2) The judge in woodcut print style (coarse line engravings, black-white contrast), gavel-striking action frozen mid-air; 3) The lawyer in hard black ink line comic style (strong contrast, hands with exaggerated perspective), reaching to hand a document toward the witness stand; 4) The defendant in stop-motion claymation style (clay facial expressions and wrinkles), turning back to look and partially occluded by the bailiff; 5) The witness in classical oil painting style (soft gradients and canvas texture), hand on microphone ready to respond; 6) A nearby display screen showing a Mondrian-style geometric composition evidence diagram (De Stijl, red, yellow, blue rectangles with black lines, picture-in-picture), containing no text. Requirements: distinct style boundaries but unified lighting and perspective across all elements, realistic occlusion, reflection and contact interactions, no readable text anywhere in the image.
